extraction.one_line_summary: WOODS attacked MAJKA inside final kilometer after cooperating breakaway, taking both stage win and GC lead on Poggio Morello summit finish
tactical_patterns: WOODS attacked at 5.8km when chasers at 13s, forcing EF domestique tempo that prevented regain
KELDERMAN led chase group sprint at 20s, revealing Sunweb prioritized GC over Pantani bonus seconds
MAJKA cooperated with WOODS despite Bora sprinter deficit, exposing team confusion about stage objectives
THOMAS showing recovery form riding near front on Poggio Morella, contradicting post-UAE weakness narrative

rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: won by ambushing cooperative partner MAJKA on final kilometer, showing superior acceleration at altitude
rider_signals.MAJKA Rafał: negative: failed to anticipate WOODS attack despite watching him entire climb, tactical naivety cost stage
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: positive: led chase group sprint at 20s, Sunweb protecting GC position over bonus seconds
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: positioned near front on steepest Poggio Morella sections, suggesting recovery from recent struggles
rider_signals.DUNBAR Eddie: negative: explicitly described as suffering on Poggio Morella climb despite EF team support
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: neutral: finished chase group at 30s, maintaining GC contention without forcing issue
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: conceded 43s on home soil climb, significant deficit for short stage race
rider_signals.CONRAD Patrick: positive: contested chase sprint with KELDERMAN at 20s, Bora protecting multiple GC options
